sections.sectionTitle: Topa' Minthan'na Vang tawh Biakinn Kidim

verses.text: Tua khit ciangin a mipa in biakinn nisuahna lama om kongpi-ah hong paipih a
nisuahna lam panin Israel-te' Pasian' minthan'na vang hong pai ka mu hi. Pasian' awging pen tuipi ging tawh kibang a, ama minthan'na vang in leitung taangsak lela hi
Hih ka maangmuhna pen, Pasian in Jerusalem khuapi a susia dingin a pailai-a ka muh leh Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh tawh kibang hi. Tua ciangin thakhatin leilak kiden'na-in ka boksuk hi
Topa' minthan'na vang in nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin biakinn sungah a lut hi
Tua ciangin Topa' kha in hong la-in a tual sungnungah hong paipih a, tua lai panin, Topa' minthan'na vang tawh biakinnsung a kidimna ka mu hi
Tua lai mun panin kei kiangah a mipa a din' laitakin biakinnsung panin Topa in kei hong hopihna ka za a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih lai munah ka kumpi tokhom om hi. Israel mite lak hih lai munah ka teng ding a, amaute ka uk tawntung ding hi. Israel mite leh a kumpite un pasian dang biakna tawh ahi a, a kumpi sisate uh phawkna ding mual bawlna tawh ahi zongin ka min siangtho daisak ngei nawnlo ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh a kumpite un a kongkhuam uh leh a kongzawlte uh keima biakinn kongkhuam leh kongzawlte tawh kimatin bawl uh a, ka kikal uh kawm bek in hong hal hi. A muhdahhuai a gamtatnate khempeuh uh tawh ka min siangtho hong daisak uh a, kei zong ka heh manin amaute ka susiamang hi

Ahi zongin tu-in amaute in pasian dangte bia nawnloin, a kumpi sisate uh phawkna a mual uh a phiat ding uh ahi hi. Tua bangin a gamtat nak uh leh amaute lakah ka teng paisuak tawntung ding hi,” hong ci hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in a thugen hong zomlai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite tungah biakinn thu leh a gelna khempeuh cingtakin lak in la, amaute' mawh gamtatna hangin maizumsak in

Amaute a gamtatnasate uh hangin hong maizum theih uh leh, biakinn gelna, a lim, a lutna leh a pusuahna, a buppi lim, a na khempeuh a kigelna, leh a zat dan ding khempeuh a cingtakin amaute tungah laktel in la, amaute in a kigelnate thei-in a zat dan ding bangin a zuih theihna dingun amaute-a' dingin lai-in gelhsak in
Biakinn tawh kisai ngeina in: Mualtunga om biakinn kimkot mun khempeuh pen biakna tawh kisai-in a siangtho ahi hi

“Biakna tau golna pen hih bang hi ding hi. A tehna dingin biakinn tehna-a kizang ngeite mah hi ding hi. A biakna tau bul kimkot pen letmat sawmnih sangin, letmat sawmnih mah zai ding a, a tau kimkotah letmat sawm a sangin geivial nei ding hi
A tau bul panin a tau zawl nuainung ciang pi li hi ding a, a sahna letmat sawmnih hi ding hi. Tua ban siah pi sagih sangto ding a, letmat sawmnih sah ding hi
A tungnung pen, ganhing kihalna mun pi sagih sang ding a, a kiu li-ah letmat sawmnih a sang ki om ciat ding hi
A biakna tau dawnzang pen a dung a vai a kikim hi ding a, pi sawmnih sau-in pi sawmnih mah zai ding hi

Biakna tau a paito a laizang santeng pen a dung a vai a kikim, pi sawmnihli hi ding a, a nuai dawl sangin letmat sawm pai-in neuzaw ding hi. Tua a din'na a nuai gual kimkot letmat sawmnih pai-in zai ding hi. Biakna tau tung kahna ding kahlei pen nisuahna lampangah om ding hi,” hong ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih biakna tau zatna ding ngeinate hih bang hi ding hi: Biakna tau a kizawh khit ciangin a tungah meihal biakpiakna leh biakpiakna ganhing site thehna tawh apna a bawl ding na hi hi

Zadok' suanlekhak Levi siampite pen keima na a sem dingin ka omna-ah a hong pai dingte ahi uh hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong pia hi. Mawhna hangin biakna-a piak dingin amaute tungah bawngtal khat na pia ding hi

Nangmah in a sisan pawlkhat la-in biakna tau kiu li-a om ki lite, biakna tau paito a laizang kiute, leh a kimkotah a om a geihualte na nuh ding a, hih bangin hihna tawh biakna tau sian'suahin na ap ding hi
Mawhna hangin biakna-in a kipia bawngtal pen la-in biakinn huang pualam, a mun hong kigenna sanah a hal ding na hi hi
A zing ciangin paubaan'na a omlo keeltal khat la-in mawhna hangin biakna-in na pia ding hi. Bawngtal si tawh na sian'suah mah bangin hih keeltal si tawh zong biakna tau na sian'suah ding hi
Hih bangin sian'suahna na man khit ciangin, paubaan'na a omlo bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat na la ding a
Topa ahi keima kiangah nong paipih ding hi. Siampite in tua ganhingte tungah ci thehin, keimah hong biakna-in tua ganhingte hal ding uh hi
Mawhna hangin biakpiakna-in ni sagih sung nisimin, paubaan'na a omlo keeltal khat, bawngtal khat, leh tuutal khat a pia ding na hi uh hi
Siampite in ni sagih sung biakna tau apna bawlin zattheih dingin a baihsa-in omsak ding uh hi

Hih bangin ni sagih sung a hih khit uh ciangin, a ni giat ni-a kipanin siampite in meihal biakna leh thunuama biakpiaknate, biakna tau tungah piak ding kipan ding uh hi. Tua ciangin note tungah kei ka lungkim ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi.
